dependent_note: No other module imports engine/catalog yet (package is scaffold-only). This subtask introduces a purely additive, self-contained type with no existing callers to break.
future_dependents_anticipated: engine/catalog (subtask 1.1.2 slotted page will embed/reference CatalogRecord's encoded size)
risk_rationale: Foundational, isolated struct + fixed-size binary encoding. No concurrency, no I/O, no existing dependents to regress. Only risk is picking an encoding layout that later subtasks must adapt to, which is acceptable/expected at this stage.
